meaning: vt.占有,行乞,搜寻,搜集vi.东张西望,搜寻,搜集,乞讨,偷东西
examples: We managed to scrounge every piece of gear you requested.
If you're on the scrounge again, I've no money.
Williams had to scrounge enough money to get his car out of the car park.
Making a bridge loan to itself buys a limited amount of time to scrounge up more capital.
Anyone who left to try to scrounge for roots in the woods was killed by the Powhatans.
